'''Kailion''' was the main port world for the [[77 Sectors]].<ref name="Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> It was the location of the [[Kailion caves]].<ref name="Peril in the Kailion Caves">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/kallion|text=Peril in the Kailion Caves|int=Peril in the Kailion Caves}}</ref>

During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Sheyasti Trade Syndicate]] operated on this world. A team of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] led by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Dajjun]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Karii]], was dispatched here to acquire a droid that would prove the Syndicate was [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] supplies to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. They acquired it, but were forced to fight a number of creatures in the Kailion caves while making their escape.<ref name="Peril in the Kailion Caves" />
